title: 151 Products LTD 12 x Wardrobe Dehumidifier
features: EFFECTIVE MOISTURE CONTROL: These hanging dehumidifier bags absorb excess moisture from the air, helping to prevent damp, mildew, mould, and condensation in enclosed spaces. Perfect for keeping wardrobes, cupboards, and storage areas dry and fresh.
VALUE PACK OF 12: With 4 packs of 3 hanging bags, this set offers excellent value and ensures multiple areas in the home or caravan stay dry and protected from damp all year round.

PRESERVES CLOTHING & FABRICS: Designed to protect clothing, bedding, and linens from moisture damage, these bags help prevent musty odours and fabric deterioration. Ideal for seasonal storage or delicate garments.

IDEAL FOR SMALL, ENCLOSED SPACES: Specially made for spaces with little airflow, such as wardrobes, cupboards, under-sink areas, and storage boxes. Helps maintain a cleaner, fresher environment year-round.

EASY HANGING DESIGN: Featuring a built-in hook, these dehumidifier bags are simple to hang in wardrobes or cupboards without taking up shelf space. Perfect for use alongside wardrobe fresheners for added freshness.
SUITABLE FOR HOME & TRAVEL: These moisture absorbers are great for home use and make excellent caravan accessories or boat storage solutions, protecting belongings during damp winter months.
LONG-LASTING PROTECTION: Each bag can last between 3–6 weeks, depending on humidity levels, providing continuous damp absorption to protect against mould and mildew.
NO SPILLS OR MESS: Moisture is securely trapped inside the bag, keeping the surrounding area clean and dry. Simply dispose of when the crystals have fully dissolved into liquid.
PROTECTS AGAINST SEASONAL DAMP: Helps prevent condensation and damp build-up during colder months when ventilation is reduced, making them perfect for winter storage and travel use.
VERSATILE USES: Ideal for clothing storage, shoe cupboards, holiday homes, caravans, boats, and more. Keeps items dry, odour-free, and protected from moisture damage.
description: Product Description These 151 Hanging Dehumidifier Bags are a simple and effective way to combat damp, mildew, mould, and condensation in small, enclosed spaces. Designed with special moisture-absorbing crystals, they work to draw excess water from the air and trap it securely, helping to prevent damage to clothing, furniture, and stored items. Ideal for use as wardrobe fresheners and damp absorbers, they leave spaces fresher and drier for longer. The hanging bag design is perfect for wardrobes, cupboards, storage boxes, and under-sink areas, as well as seasonal use in caravans, boats, and other places prone to high humidity. Each pack contains 12 dehumidifiers for home use, providing long-lasting protection against moisture-related problems. Easy to use and completely mess-free, these moisture absorbers are a must-have caravan accessory and home care essential for keeping belongings safe from the effects of dampness all year round. Box Contains 12 wardrobe dehumidifiers

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Anti-Spill, Automatic Moisture Removal, Continuous Draining, Portable, Quiet Operation, Water Level Indicator
